title: quercus ilex var. oleoides
intro: Quercus ilex var. oleoides, also known as the holm oak or evergreen oak, is a variant of the Quercus ilex species, a type of evergreen tree native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Quercus ilex var. oleoides include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Quercus ilex var. oleoides include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. Quercus ilex var. oleoides can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
